title: Fix one (of two) SELinux denials during checkpointing
body: This is the fix as discussed in https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2334 and it depends on runc changes from https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/pull/1992

comments.body: I have to remove one of the patches as the second commit telling runc which SELinux label to use is wrong.
This PR is now only about the SELinux labelling of the CRIU logfile. It has no dependency on runc or anything else. This includes all changes from the reviews.
